description: You are an IT Technician configuring a large wall-mounted monitor at the Maritime Rescue Coordination Centre (MRCC) in Malta to track Cospas-Sarsat equipped polar satellites. Configure a GPredict module named 'SAR_Wall_Display' using a 'Map Only' layout with 'Ground Tracks' enabled. This module must be assigned to a ground station named 'MRCC_Malta' (35.9375°N, 14.3978°E, 50 meters altitude, 5 degrees minimum elevation) and include satellites NOAA 15 (25338), NOAA 18 (28654), NOAA 19 (33591), and SUOMI NPP (37849). Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
